ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "app_id" TEXT /* Unique application identifier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation category */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (Full-Time or Part-Time) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or status of the application */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "resume_path" TEXT /* File path or URL to the applicant's resume */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the reservation category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reservation category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* Reference to the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applicants ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job position */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (Full-Time or Part-Time) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date when the job was posted */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Deadline for applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* Reference to the applicant */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job position */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "cover_letter_path" TEXT /* File path or URL to the applicant's cover letter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applicants ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date when the interview took place */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interviewer */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the interviewer */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., technical, HR) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interview in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES interviewers ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviewers" (
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the interviewer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the interviewer belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the interviewer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the interviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_letters" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer letter */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date when the offer letter was sent */,
  "salary_offered" REAL /* Salary offered to the applicant */,
  "accepted" INTEGER /* Whether the offer was accepted */,
  "offer_expiration_date" TEXT /* Deadline by which the offer must be accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_letters_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee within the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the company, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review took place */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating out of 5 */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the session took place */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)
